attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
OBJECT_ID,
COALESCE(DEAL_OBJECT_ID, -999) AS DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
NULL AS ERP_PRICE_LIST_ID,
COALESCE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(CREATED_BY,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL) , UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') as CREATED_BY,
COALESCE(EL.CREATED_ON, CURRENT_DATE) as CREATED_ON,
COALESCE(OREPLACE(OREPLACE(UPDATED_BY,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL) , CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS UPDATED_BY,
COALESCE(EL.UPDATED_ON, CURRENT_DATE) as UPDATED_ON,
ACTIVE,
'N' AS NET_PRICE_DEAL ,
'N' AS FRAME_AGREEEMENT,
NULL AS SOURCE_TYPE,
'' as PROD_PRICING_COMMENT,
'' as SERV_PRICING_COMMENT,
PRICE_LIST_ID,
'-999' AS INACTIVE_OBJECT_ID,
0 AS BOM_STATE,
NULL(Timestamp(0)) AS LAST_PRICED_DATE,
NULL AS CART_ID,
NULL AS SITE_OBJECT_ID,
NULL AS BOM_SOURCE,
NULL AS CONTRACTUAL_DISC,
NULL(Timestamp(0)) AS QUOTE_IMPORT_DATE,
QUOTE_ID,
OREPLACE(QUOTE_NAME,CHR(10),'') as QUOTE_NAME,
NULL AS TRADEIN_STATE,
NULL AS CBN_STATUS,
NULL AS CBN_DISTI_ID,
IS_Q2O_ELIGIBLE,
'' AS DISCOUNT_SUMMARY,
NULL AS AUTO_NEGOTIATE_NS,
NULL AS CBN_SPLIT_ELIGIBLE,
IS_DISTI_Q2O_ELIGIBLE,
NULL AS TAB_FLAG,
NULL AS TAB_SUBTRACK,
NULL AS TAB_PERIOD,
'-999' AS PRICE_BOOK_ID,
CURRENCY_CODE,
NULL AS BILLING_TERM, 
FULFILLMENT_TYPE,
NULL AS FULFILLMENT_SOURCE_ID,
'' AS IRONPORT_FLAG,
'' AS PRICED_FOR_AUTH,
NULL AS COPY_FROM_QUOTE,
QUOTE_STATUS_ID AS QUOTE_STATUS_ID,
INTENDED_USE,
NULL AS QUOTE_CATEGORY,
NULL(Timestamp(0)) AS QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DATE,
IS_STRINGENT,
IS_FINALIZED,
'N' AS CUSTOMER_CATALOG_FLAG,
NULL AS IS_FA_FLAG,
NULL AS FA_DEAL_ID,
FEDERAL_FLG,
NULL AS TAA_FLG,
'' AS IS_ERATE_DEAL,
'' AS RN,
'UNKNOWN' AS QUOTE_STATUS_NAME,
'N' AS INCREMENTAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,
NULL AS GDR_FLAG,
'' AS STD_INCR_FLAG,
NULL AS CRP_FLAG,
NULL AS LEAD_PARTNER_TYPE,
NULL AS LEAD_PARTNERS,
BUY_METHOD,
IS_PCM
FROM 
$$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_CQ_SNGL_QUOTE_VW_RNWL_KFKA EL 
/*Commented as part of CCWR
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY EL.DEAL_OBJECT_ID ORDER BY EL.EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC)=1*/
WHERE  (EL.IS_STRINGENT ='N' OR EL.IS_FINALIZED ='Y') 
AND EL.EDW_CREATE_DTM >= (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS where JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_ST_INT_CQ_SNGL_QUOTE_VW_RNWL_KFKA')
